data.description: Sequential execution required because IMPL-1 through IMPL-4 all touch Game content extraction/内容抽取.py; preserve existing widget attribute names and business logic.

Blind-box workspace builder preserves the existing single-line input, category/animal/default count variables, auto-paste, output widget, extraction/copy/clear/history commands; the legacy action-row 人物表情抽取 button was removed so the top workspace switcher is the expression entry.

Expression extraction UI now builds inside the main expression workspace with preserved expression_input_text, expression_output_text, expression_template_mode_var, and expression_template_index_var; open_expression_window now only switches to that workspace and focuses the input, so default UI no longer creates a Toplevel.
